prompt:
A tall 1 L translucent plastic bottle filled with slightly tinted nutrient concentrate stands on a shelf, with a simple leaf-and-droplet icon indicating plant fertilizer rather than any readable text. In front of the bottle, a measuring syringe draws up a small amount of the concentrate, and a large reservoir tub with clear water sits nearby, suggesting that the concentrate will be diluted at a precise ratio for leafy greens. A few healthy hydroponic plants in net pots are visible in the soft background.

The setting is a bright near-future solarpunk grow room, with reflective panels, organized rows of containers, and soft overhead lighting. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or legible wording on the bottle, and a composition that emphasizes the nutrient concentrate bottle, the drawn syringe, and the waiting reservoir while the rest of the grow environment stays pleasantly blurred.
